title: Robustly Roasted American Chicken Bake
description: A hearty, low-glycemic American dish featuring wood-fired roasted chicken, infused with the bold flavor of hot sauce, served with a side of fluffy, grassy herbs.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together hot sauce, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the hot sauce mixture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the chicken breast in a single layer.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
While the chicken is cooking, mix together chopped parsley and dill in a small bowl.
After 30 minutes, remove the chicken from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Return the chicken to the oven and continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken on a bed of parsley and dill, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
